caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on "THE DATASET" related to cryptocurrency data. The presenter, standing behind a podium with a microphone, discusses a dataset comprising all historical data from the top 100 cryptocurrencies. The data spans from the beginning up to September 2017 and includes 563,871 daily price (close) points. The background of the slide is visually engaging, featuring a network-like design that symbolizes connectivity and data relationships. The presenter appears to be explaining the significance and scope of this dataset, likely in the context of data analysis or machine learning applications within the cryptocurrency market.
